creator: tagattie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to void from comment #1)

I don't have IPv6-only environment and I can't reproduce the issue.

According the URL:
https://github.com/yarnpkg/yarn/issues/6031

yarn tries to reach IPv4 address even in IPv6-only system and the workaround (adding IPv6 address to /etc/hosts) may help.
